current_extraction.notes: Captured via playwright. The original /publications/australias-artificial-intelligence-action-plan URL now redirects to the department's general AI policy portal; the 2021 standalone Action Plan PDF is no longer hosted as a dedicated page. The redirect target captures the current Australian Government AI policy stack including framework, ethics principles, and procurement guidance.
